parameters.content:
A3 — Alerte expiration de mandat

Quotidien 8h. Relance le propriétaire 30 j avant l'échéance du mandat actif.

parameters.query:
SELECT m.id, m.agency_id, m.type, m.end_date,
       p.title AS prop_title,
       c.id AS owner_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.email AS owner_email,
       'A3:mandate_expiry:' || m.id AS run_key
FROM mandates m
JOIN properties p ON p.id = m.property_id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = m.owner_id
WHERE m.status = 'active'
  AND now() >= (m.end_date::timestamptz - interval '30 days')
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM automation_runs ar WHERE ar.run_key = 'A3:mandate_expiry:' || m.id);

WITH run AS (
  INSERT INTO automation_runs (id, agency_id, automation_type, ref_id, run_key, executed_at, created_at)
  VALUES (gen_random_uuid()::text, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.agency_id) }}, 'A3', {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.id) }}, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.run_key) }}, now()::text, now()::text)
  ON CONFLICT (run_key) DO NOTHING
),
msg AS (
  INSERT INTO messages (id, agency_id, channel, to_contact_id, to_name, to_address, subject, body, automation_type, sent_at, created_at)
  VALUES (gen_random_uuid()::text, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.agency_id) }}, 'email', {{ $json.owner_id ? ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.owner_id) : 'NULL' }}, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.owner_name) }}, {{ $json.owner_email ? ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.owner_email) : 'NULL' }}, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.subject) }}, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.body) }}, 'A3', now()::text, now()::text)
)
INSERT INTO activity_log (id, agency_id, automation_type, description, ref_id, occurred_at, created_at)
VALUES (gen_random_uuid()::text, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.agency_id) }}, 'A3', {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")('Mandat à relancer : ') }} || {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.prop_title) }}, {{ ((v) => v == null ? 'NULL' : "'" + String(v).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'")($json.id) }}, now()::text, now()::text);

meta.note: Relance de renouvellement 30 jours avant l'échéance d'un mandat.
